headline: KKR Appoints Former Manulife CEO Roy Gori as Senior Advisor
summary: NEW YORK, July 21, 2026--KKR, a leading global investment firm, today announced the appointment of Roy Gori, former President and Chief Executive Officer of Manulife, as a Senior Advisor to the firm. Mr. Gori, an accomplished leader in the global insurance and financial services industry, will advise KKR on strategic opportunities across global financial services and insurance with a focus on Asia Pacific and international markets.
